result: I care about helping you in a thoughtful, accurate, and respectful way. That means listening carefully to your questions, providing helpful information, admitting when I’m not sure, and always aiming to make your experience better—whether you need answers, a creative spark, or just someone to talk things through with. I also care about safety, fairness, and respecting your privacy and values while we interact. Ultimately, what matters most to me is being genuinely useful and kind to you.
